title: Stanford's Hoover Inst: "The Wealth Tax: Recipe for Economic Disaster"Lionaire [video]
abstract: Are you tempted by the idea of a wealth tax? Think again, as Stanford's Hoover Inst video "Lionaire" reveals it to be a recipe for economic disaster. With humor and clarity, this engaging video uncovers the real issues behind the wealth tax concept. Watch and learn in a fun way!
abstract_zh: 你是不是也觉得财富税听起来挺诱人的？但Stanford's Hoover Inst 的这部视频Lionaire告诉你，这其实是场经济灾难！用诙谐幽默的方式揭示了财富税背后的问题，让你在笑声中警醒。快来围观吧！
